## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Juan Buis' experience, work style, and potential collaboration opportunities with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Juan has extensive experience in content design, UX writing, and design systems for major tech companies (Spotify, Minecraft, WordPress)](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [GrowthX is rapidly growing, offering full-service marketing and developing proprietary software for scaling their agency](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Juan is flexible with engagement models, from short-term projects to longer retainers, with rates around €100-110/hour for substantial contracts](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Both parties are open to remote work and exploring potential collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Overview and Current Projects

  - [GrowthX is a rapidly growing full-service marketing agency, doubling in size from 6 to 11 employees this year](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Developing proprietary software platform to replace off-the-shelf tools and potentially spin off as SaaS](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Working with high-profile clients like Surge (AI post-training lab) on rebranding and marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Focusing on foundational brand language, tone of voice, and content creation at scale using AI](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

### Juan's Professional Background

  - [Extensive experience in content design and UX writing for major tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Notable projects:](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
      - [Minecraft: First content design hire, focused on improving UX and onboarding for 300M+ players](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Spotify: Worked on design systems, including the launch of Anchor (internal design system)](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=929.0)
      - [B-Real: Conducted a comprehensive audit and redesign of the app's content and UX](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [Skilled in both short-term audits/projects and long-term engagements (e.g., 3.5 years with Minecraft)](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)

### Work Style and Preferences

  - [Adaptable to various engagement models, from short-term projects to longer retainers](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Comfortable with remote work, having worked remotely for most of the past decade](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Prefers to understand client needs and tailor approach accordingly](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Open to different time commitments, from a few hours per week to more substantial engagements](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### Availability and Rates

  - [Currently has some availability due to the conclusion of a WordPress project](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)
  - [Flexible with rates, but typically charges around €100-110/hour for substantial contracts](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Open to discussing different rate structures based on project scope and client budget](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to consider potential projects or roles where Juan's expertise could be valuable
  - If interested, GrowthX to reach out with more specific project details or collaboration opportunities
  - [Juan is open to further discussions about his past projects and deliverables if needed](https://fathom.video/share/QzF_FwfZTufsh39oEh8fMUkcf9qPJa8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1798.0)
